title: How to get initials from a name
task: Turn first and last names into initials, like "Ada Lovelace" → "AL".

excel.note: With names in separate columns. Add UPPER(...) if the source may be lowercase.

explanation: LEFT(text,1) takes the first character of each name and & glues them together — "A" + "L" = "AL". For a full name in ONE cell, take the first letter plus the letter after the space: =LEFT(A2,1)&MID(A2,FIND(" ",A2)+1,1). Add periods with &"." if you want "A.L." style.
